title: Squirrel Removal in Passaic, NJ | Professional Services $900-$2,500

Our experienced team provides humane squirrel trapping, complete exclusion work, and damage repair throughout Passaic's diverse neighborhoods. We understand the unique challenges faced by homeowners in this historic city and deliver lasting solutions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Passaic and surrounding communities for years with proven squirrel removal expertise. Our licensed technicians provide same-day emergency services, humane removal methods, and comprehensive warranties that protect your home from future squirrel intrusions.

From the historic districts near Third Ward to newer developments, our team knows the local architecture and common wildlife pressure points that Passaic homeowners face.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Passaic, NJ?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Passaic typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and initial cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before starting any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Passaic home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Passaic. The initial trapping process typically takes 3-7 days depending on how many squirrels are present. Once all squirrels are removed, we immediately seal entry points to prevent re-entry. Most complete jobs are finished within one to two weeks.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause in Passaic homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly damage attic insulation, chew through electrical wiring creating fire hazards, tear up soffits and fascia boards, and leave droppings that pose health risks. In Passaic's older homes, they often exploit existing gaps in rooflines and vents. Our service includes damage assessment and repairs to restore your home's integrity.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for squirrel removal in Passaic?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all exclusion work. If squirrels re-enter through any area we've sealed, we return at no additional charge to resolve the issue. Our humane removal methods comply with all New Jersey wildlife regulations, and we stand behind our workmanship to ensure your Passaic home remains squirrel-free.
